forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Clear. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. North wind around 10 mph.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 68, with temperatures falling to around 65 in the afternoon. North northwest wind 5 to 9 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn breaks over Downtown San Francisco, the city awakens to a clear sky whispering promises of a pleasant day ahead. The early hours blanket the streets in a gentle calm, with temperatures settling at a comfortable 52. A soft northerly breeze stirs the air, caressing the skin with its cool touch. As the sun climbs higher, the luminous glow begins to paint the cityscape, heralding a sunny day that will reach near 68 degrees by afternoon. The forecast lends no hint of fog, allowing the Golden Gate and the sprawl of the city to glitter in clarity, free from the typical morning marine layer.

For those contemplating an outing, the pleasant weather beckons. Attire should remain simple yet adaptable—perhaps a light jacket for the morning chill, giving way to comfortable layers as the day warms. A leisurely stroll along the Embarcadero or a visit to one of the local cafes would perfectly suit these tranquil conditions. Relish a serene moment on a patio, coffee in hand, soaking in the wisdom of the day. With such inviting weather, time spent outdoors would surely nourish the soul.
